result.text:
My wife and I have some heartbreaking news to share: we lost our baby at 21 weeks 

We’re devastated, and I’ll likely quieter while we take time to grieve and heal. 

You may see me lurking when I'm looking for a distraction but family comes first

Thank you all for for the kindness you’ve shown us

legacy.full_text:
@rcivNFT we haven't met or interacted much that i can see, but as a dad myself I am absolutely gutted to see this. 

sending love from a stranger on the internet. i'm so sorry, and i really hope you find comfort and love with your family and friends while you grieve and heal.
